programs.name: Russia Harmful Activities
programs.description: Targets Russia for malicious cyber activities, election interference, transnational corruption, and undermining international institutions.

programs.name: Global Terrorism
programs.description: Targets individuals and entities that commit, threaten, or support terrorism designated under Executive Order 13224.

programs.name: Iran Financial Regulations
programs.description: Targets foreign financial institutions that facilitate transactions for sanctioned Iranian entities.

programs.name: Narcotics Kingpin
programs.description: Targets the most significant foreign narcotics kingpins and their networks under the Kingpin Act.

programs.name: Non-Proliferation WMD
programs.description: Targets entities contributing to the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction and their means of delivery.

programs.name: Ukraine Financial & Energy
programs.description: Targets entities operating in Russia's financial services, energy, metals, mining, and defense sectors.

programs.name: Global Magnitsky
programs.description: Targets perpetrators of serious human rights abuse and corruption worldwide under the Global Magnitsky Act.

programs.name: Iran Sanctions
programs.description: Comprehensive sanctions targeting Iran's nuclear program, support for terrorism, and human rights violations.

programs.name: Iran Industrial Sectors
programs.description: Targets additional sectors of Iran's economy including construction and manufacturing.

programs.name: Illicit Drug Trade
programs.description: Targets international traffickers of illicit drugs including fentanyl and synthetic opioids.

programs.name: Iran Reimposition
programs.description: Reimposed sanctions on Iran following U.S. withdrawal from the JCPOA nuclear deal.

programs.name: Transnational Crime
programs.description: Targets significant transnational criminal organizations and their leaders, facilitators, and financial networks.

programs.name: Revolutionary Guard Corps
programs.description: Targets Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and its affiliates designated as a foreign terrorist organization.

programs.name: Cyber Activities
programs.description: Targets persons engaged in significant malicious cyber-enabled activities threatening U.S. national security.

programs.name: Iran Human Rights
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for serious human rights abuses against the people of Iran.

programs.name: Ukraine Military & Defense
programs.description: Targets Russian defense and intelligence officials involved in the destabilization of Ukraine.

programs.name: North Korea Max Pressure
programs.description: Maximum pressure campaign targeting North Korea's revenue sources and sanctions evasion networks.

programs.name: Iraq Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons threatening the peace and stability of Iraq and undermining democratic governance.

programs.name: Belarus Democracy
programs.description: Targets the Lukashenko regime's crackdown on democratic opposition and civil society.

programs.name: Venezuela Economy
programs.description: Targets sectors of the Venezuelan economy including gold exploited by the Maduro regime.

programs.name: Space Resources
programs.description: Protects American access to strategically significant resources and activities in outer space.

programs.name: Venezuela Sanctions
programs.description: Targets the Maduro regime and its supporters undermining democratic governance in Venezuela.

programs.name: Western Balkans
programs.description: Targets persons undermining peace, security, and stability in the Western Balkans region.

programs.name: Narcotics Trafficking
programs.description: Targets significant foreign narcotics traffickers and their organizations under the Foreign Narcotics Kingpin Designation Act.

programs.name: North Korea Additional
programs.description: Additional sanctions on North Korea addressing continued provocative actions and WMD proliferation.

programs.name: Myanmar Military Junta
programs.description: Targets the Myanmar military junta and its leaders following the February 2021 coup.

programs.name: Ukraine Destabilization
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for or complicit in actions undermining democratic processes in Ukraine.

programs.name: North Korea Proliferation
programs.description: Targets proliferation networks supporting North Korea's nuclear and missile development.

programs.name: Iran Financial Sector
programs.description: Targets Iran's financial sector including the Central Bank of Iran and sovereign wealth fund.

programs.name: Election Interference
programs.description: Targets foreign persons interfering in U.S. elections through cyber, propaganda, or financial means.

programs.name: Crimea Region
programs.description: Prohibits trade, investment, and transactions related to the Crimea region of Ukraine.

programs.name: Foreign Terrorist Org
programs.description: Designates foreign organizations that engage in terrorist activity threatening U.S. nationals or national security.

programs.name: DR Congo Sanctions
programs.description: Targets armed groups and individuals contributing to the conflict in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

programs.name: Cyber Infrastructure
programs.description: Targets malicious cyber activities against U.S. critical infrastructure and government networks.

programs.name: CAATSA Russia
programs.description: CAATSA provisions targeting Russia's defense, intelligence, mining, and energy pipeline sectors.

programs.name: Palestinian Legis. Council
programs.description: Lists members of the Palestinian Legislative Council affiliated with Hamas subject to restrictions.

programs.name: Nicaragua Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for undermining democratic institutions and human rights in Nicaragua.

programs.name: Cuba Sanctions
programs.description: Comprehensive U.S. embargo on Cuba restricting trade, financial transactions, and travel.

programs.name: Belarus Sanctions
programs.description: Targets the Lukashenko regime for undermining democracy and human rights in Belarus.

programs.name: North Korea WMD
programs.description: Targets North Korea's weapons of mass destruction and ballistic missile programs.

programs.name: Chinese Military Companies
programs.description: Prohibits U.S. persons from investing in Chinese military-industrial complex companies.

programs.name: Venezuela Gold Sector
programs.description: Targets Venezuela's gold sector and corrupt actors enriching themselves at the expense of the Venezuelan people.

programs.name: Magnitsky Act
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for the death of Sergei Magnitsky and other gross human rights violations in Russia.

programs.name: Libya Stability
programs.description: Targets threats to Libya's stability and actors obstructing the peace process.

programs.name: Iran Metals & Mining
programs.description: Targets Iran's metals, mining, textiles, construction, and manufacturing sectors.

programs.name: Sudan Stability
programs.description: Targets actors threatening the peace, stability, and democratic transition in Sudan.

programs.name: Hong Kong Autonomy
programs.description: Targets officials undermining Hong Kong's autonomy and restricting freedoms guaranteed under the Basic Law.

programs.name: Iran Transactions
programs.description: Regulates transactions with Iran under the Iranian Transactions and Sanctions Regulations (31 CFR Part 560).

programs.name: Iran Conventional Arms
programs.description: Targets the transfer of conventional arms to or from Iran and related proliferation activities.

programs.name: Somalia Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons threatening the peace, security, and stability of Somalia including Al-Shabaab militants.

programs.name: Central African Republic
programs.description: Targets persons contributing to the conflict and instability in the Central African Republic.

programs.name: Election Protection
programs.description: Protects against foreign efforts to influence or undermine U.S. elections and democratic processes.

programs.name: Iran Counter-Proliferation
programs.description: Sanctions on Iran's energy, shipping, shipbuilding, and port sectors under the Iran Freedom and Counter-Proliferation Act.

programs.name: South Sudan Conflict
programs.description: Targets actors fueling the civil conflict and humanitarian crisis in South Sudan.

programs.name: Balkans Corruption
programs.description: Targets corruption and organized crime destabilizing the Western Balkans.

programs.name: Libya Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons threatening the peace, security, and stability of Libya.

programs.name: CAATSA Iran
programs.description: CAATSA provisions targeting Iran's ballistic missile program and support for terrorism.

programs.name: Hostage-Taking
programs.description: Targets persons involved in hostage-taking and the wrongful detention of U.S. nationals abroad.

programs.name: Human Rights (Iran)
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for serious human rights abuses in Iran including censorship and political repression.

programs.name: Lebanon Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons undermining Lebanon's sovereignty and contributing to political and economic instability.

programs.name: ICC Sanctions
programs.description: Targets International Criminal Court officials involved in investigations against U.S. personnel and allies.

programs.name: Iraq Destabilization
programs.description: Targets destabilizing activities and corruption threatening Iraq's sovereignty.

programs.name: Yemen Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons threatening the peace, security, and stability of Yemen including Houthi militants.

programs.name: Cyber Elections
programs.description: Targets foreign persons interfering in U.S. elections through malicious cyber operations.

programs.name: Darfur Sanctions
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for genocide, war crimes, and human rights abuses in the Darfur region of Sudan.

programs.name: Russia Energy Investment
programs.description: Prohibits new investment in the Russian Federation's energy sector by U.S. persons.

programs.name: Nicaragua Human Rights
programs.description: Sanctions under the Nicaragua Human Rights and Anticorruption Act targeting regime officials.

programs.name: Ethiopia Crisis
programs.description: Addresses the crisis in northern Ethiopia and the humanitarian emergency in the Tigray region.

programs.name: Mali Peace Process
programs.description: Targets those obstructing the peace process and implementation of the Algiers Accord in Mali.

programs.name: Pariah States
programs.description: Sanctions provisions protecting against international pariah and aggressor states.

programs.name: Syria Drug Trade
programs.description: Targets Syria's illicit drug trade networks including Captagon production and trafficking.

programs.name: North Korea NKSPEA
programs.description: Sanctions under the North Korea Sanctions and Policy Enhancement Act targeting WMD and human rights abuses.

programs.name: Human Rights (Syria)
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for serious human rights abuses in Syria under the Assad regime.

programs.name: Uyghur Human Rights
programs.description: Targets persons responsible for human rights abuses against Uyghurs and other minorities in Xinjiang.

programs.name: Iran 561-Related
programs.description: Sanctions under Section 561 of the Iran Threat Reduction Act targeting financial facilitators.
